global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a clear focus on food delivery services.
global.main_message: Promoting quick dinner options with a special sale.

elements.label: Orange gradient background
elements.description: A smooth orange gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: FreshDash logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring a stylized food delivery icon in a light color, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Dinner in minutes text
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Dinner in minutes' that is centrally aligned and prominent.

elements.label: Late-night deals text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main headline that reads 'Late-night deals available'.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small, circular element with a price of '€9.99' displayed in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Watch now button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Watch now' in bold, inviting font, designed to attract clicks.
elements.text_content: Dinner in minutes Late-night deals available €9.99 Watch now

elements.label: FreshDash headline
elements.description: The brand name 'FreshDash' displayed in a bold font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small, bright badge in the corner with the text 'SALE' in a bold font.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the logo is centered, the main message is in the middle, and the CTA is at the bottom.
